commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=689cbb3125ed7dec0843c0e2817e6ef8b64f9b40)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a 3-second timeout to `src/gateway/net.ts` so a never-settling `canBindToHost("::1")` probe resolves false and loopback startup can continue IPv4-only.

PR surface: Source +32. Total +32 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection confirms current main and v2026.5.26 await an unbounded `canBindToHost("::1")` probe, but the macOS 11 no-event socket behavior was not reproduced here.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] External PR needs contributor-supplied real macOS 11 proof and a branch refresh; automation should not repair or merge it while that proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(net): add 3s timeout to canBindToHost to prevent Big Sur startup hang
target.author: leegisang

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
